'''âp-w-n-p''' ('''kapawnepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jedge|jedge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jedge|jedge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-w-n-p
|-
! Lemma
| kapawnepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipawnepoko|thipawnepoko]] || [[word:jipawnepoko|jipawnepoko]] || [[word:shipawnepoko|shipawnepoko]] || [[word:kipawnepoko|kipawnepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopawnepoko|thopawnepoko]] || [[word:jopawnepoko|jopawnepoko]] || [[word:shopawnepoko|shopawnepoko]] || [[word:kopawnepoko|kopawnepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpawnepoko|thĂŠpawnepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpawnepoko|jĂŠpawnepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpawnepoko|shĂŠpawnepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpawnepoko|kĂŠpawnepoko]]

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
